text:
--- Page 1 ---
177
IBD
FMC HGE: Qualiopi-certified organization for the category "training actions"
POST'U 2026
IBD in the pediatric population:
what are the specifics?
	 Olivier COURBETTE
	 Specialized Medicine Department, Pediatric Hospitals of Nice CHU-Lenval, 57 avenue de la Californie - 06200 NICE (France)
	 olivier.courbette@hpu.lenval.com
EDUCATIONAL OBJECTIVES
•	 Know the epidemiology and clinical presentations of IBD in the pediatric population
•	 Know when to use biological, endoscopic and radiological examinations
•	 Know the relevance of the child-to-adult transition consultation
•	 Know the specific aspects of therapeutic management
CONFLICT OF INTEREST
The author declares no conflicts of interest related to this presentation.
KEYWORDS
Crohn's disease; Ulcerative colitis; Pediatrics
ABBREVIATIONS
5-ASA: 5-aminosalicylic acid
6-MMP: 6-methyl mercaptopurine
6-TGN: 6-thioguanine
ADA: adalimumab
AMM: marketing authorization
CAG: acute severe colitis
ASCA: anti-Saccharomyces cerevisiae antibodies
AZA: azathioprine
CRP: C-reactive protein
CSP: primary sclerosing cholangitis
EBV: Epstein-Barr virus
NEE: nutr
